channel.title: LIBRCHAIN 区块链新闻雷达
channel.description: 每小时自动更新的区块链新闻、博客与 X 热点聚合

item.title: CoinDesk 20 performance update: index falls 3.2% as all constituents trade lower
item.description: Aave (AAVE) declined 5.6% and Cardano (ADA) dropped 4.8%, leading the index lower from Wednesday.

item.title: Bhutan Moves $37M in Bitcoin to Exchanges, Holdings Down Two-Thirds From Peak
item.description: With its latest transfer of Bitcoin to exchanges, Bhutan has reduced its sovereign holdings to 4,453 BTC from nearly 13,000 BTC in late 2024.

item.title: Chainalysis Extends Sui Support with Automatic Token Support
item.description: Chainalysis is excited to announce extended support for Sui, an emerging high-performance blockchain that has rapidly grown its ecosystem since… The post Chainalysis Extends Sui Support with Automatic Token Support appeared first on Chaina…

item.title: White House clears review of proposal to allow crypto in 401(k) retirement plans
item.description: A White House review has cleared a Labor Department proposal that could widen the path for crypto-linked exposure in 401(k) retirement plans.

item.title: How a seed phrase leak led to a $176M Bitcoin theft case
item.description: A $176 million Bitcoin theft tied to a seed phrase leak reveals how simple surveillance can bypass crypto security and drain entire wallets.

item.title: Morning Minute: Trump’s New Science Council Is a Who’s Who of AI and Crypto
item.description: Trump just stacked his science council and crypto has a seat at the table, while Circle's worst day is looking more like an overreaction.

item.title: Blockchain philanthropy fails Africa’s real-world test
item.description: Crypto philanthropy in Africa builds moments, not enduring systems. Transparency without local ownership and maintenance delivers aid dependency, not dignity.

item.title: Circle stock CRCL hints at 25% rebound as market shuns CLARITY Act fears
item.description: Bernstein kept its $190 price target for the Circle stock while Bitwise predicted the company's worth will grow 200% to $75 billion by 2030.

item.title: MARA Holdings higher by 10% after selling $1.1 billion in bitcoin to fund debt buyback
item.description: The strategic move cuts debt, reduces dilution risk, and strengthens the balance sheet for expansion into AI and energy infrastructure, said the company.

item.title: Elon Musk’s X taps ex-Aave product chief Benji Taylor to lead design
item.description: X hires former Aave chief product officer and Base design lead Benji Taylor as head of design, as the company prepares to roll out its X Money payments product.

item.title: Coinbase, Fannie Mae to Enable Crypto-Backed Mortgages
item.description: The government-sponsored mortgage giant will accept Bitcoin and USDC as collateral through a new program with Better Home and Coinbase.

item.title: U.S. midterms pack major digital assets punch as Stand With Crypto preps strategy
item.description: The terrain of Congress is likely to shift considerably even as the crypto sector continues to chase fundamental legislation.

item.title: Coinbase-backed crypto advocacy group unveils 2026 election plan
item.description: Following its successes mobilizing crypto-minded voters in 2024, Stand With Crypto said it would prioritize House races in two US states for the midterms.

item.title: Is Bitcoin’s governance too slow to fend off quantum risks?
item.description: BOLT Technologies founder Yoon Auh says the real challenge in the quantum transition is whether blockchain networks can coordinate system-wide upgrades.

item.title: Brazil passes law turning seized crypto into public-security war chest
item.description: The law lets authorities use crypto seized during investigations and expands their power to freeze, block or seize funds in a bid to crack down on criminal organizations.

item.title: Coinbase, Fannie Mae bring crypto-backed mortgages to homebuyers
item.description: The crypto exchange is working with financial technology mortgage firm Better, a Fannie Mae-approved mortgage seller.

item.title: Bitcoin Slips Under $70K as Pentagon Prepares ‘Final Blow’ in Iran
item.description: Bitcoin's support level is vulnerable as Trump's five-day pause of strikes on Iran's energy infrastructure is set to expire, analysts said.

item.title: Circle leads Tazapay extension as total Series B reaches $36M
item.description: Tazapay said Circle led a Series B extension that brought total funding to $36 million as the company expands cross-border payment rails.

item.title: Everyone's calling bitcoin resilient, may be it's just complacent
item.description: Your day-ahead look for March 26, 2026

item.title: Bitcoin in ‘later stages’ of bear market: Watch these BTC price levels
item.description: Bitcoin was down 44% from its $126,000 all-time highs as key onchain and technical indicators suggested BTC is entering the late phase of the bear market.

item.title: Nvidia investor class-action suit advances over crypto mining revenue
item.description: A California judge has certified an investor class in the Nvidia securities suit over alleged misstatements on crypto mining GPU sales, advancing the case toward a potential trial.

item.title: Crypto slides as oil spike, macro jitters trigger derivatives unwind
item.description: Bitcoin dropped below $70,000 and ether fell toward $2,000 as rising oil prices, falling equities and weak liquidity sparked risk-off flows and pressured altcoins.

item.title: UK Government Designates Xinbi, Key Node in Chinese-Language Crypto-Enabled Scam Infrastructure
item.description: TL;DR The UK’s Foreign, Commonwealth and Development Office (FCDO) has designated Xinbi, a major Chinese-language illicit guarantee marketplace. The designation… The post UK Government Designates Xinbi, Key Node in Chinese-Language Crypto-…

item.title: US recession odds near 50%: Can Bitcoin copy 2020 comeback gains?
item.description: US recession fears multiplied this week as BlackRock's Larry Fink warned of a "global" downturn over oil prices, with Bitcoin still tied to stocks.

item.title: Bitcoin has traded in a tight range for nearly 50 days – but this is not a "bear flag"
item.description: Extended range-bound price action signals structural consolidation rather than a textbook bearish continuation, despite rising downside risks.

item.title: CoinShares says up to 20% of Bitcoin miners are unprofitable
item.description: CoinShares says up to 20% of Bitcoin miners may be unprofitable at current hashprice levels, particularly those running older machines or paying higher power costs.

item.title: Bitcoin DAT trade is concentrating in Michael Saylor’s Strategy as treasury demand fades elsewhere
item.description: Strategy accounted for nearly all recent BTC digital-asset treasury purchases, with other firms’ share dropping from 95% to about 2%, CryptoQuant data show.

item.title: Fenbushi co-founder offers bounty to recover $42M lost in 2022 hack
item.description: Investigators have frozen about $1.2 million as efforts continue to trace funds lost in a wallet breach linked to a seed phrase compromise.

item.title: Some bitcoin indicators are still going the wrong way, challenging the bullish $70,000 holdout story
item.description: Key indicators such as ETF inflows cloud the bullish $70,000 holdout story

item.title: UK pushes ahead with temporary ban on political crypto donations
item.description: The government plans to implement the ban by amending the Representation of the People Bill, with changes taking "retrospective effect" from Wednesday.

item.title: Coinbase opposes stablecoin compromise in Senate crypto bill: Report
item.description: Coinbase is reportedly still pushing back against stablecoin yield provisions in the Senate’s crypto market structure bill, a move that has derailed past efforts to advance the legislation.

item.title: 💥BREAKING: Iran just granted Spain safe passage through the Strait of Hormuz. Spain continues to prohibit the US from using its military bases for operations against Iran. - x.com
item.description: <a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiYkFVX3lxTE42MFV5RGYyYXdGYW1OSUxmYlpZZHdVYmFJMTBnWXBPc19MX2JiTExWU3Z2SURIMEQ3VGQ5Nlg4cF9TanhIaUtZd2Z6NUxWYnBtVFpUYlZqSHI0aE8zblZ4MlBn?oc=5" target="_blank">💥BREAKING: Iran just granted Spai…

item.title: US Congressman Moves to Ban Staff From Trading on Prediction Markets
item.description: Congress is moving to tighten oversight of prediction markets amid rising concerns over insider trading and misuse of sensitive information.

item.title: Proposed bill seeks to ban US president, Congress from prediction markets
item.description: The bill adds to a wave of recent legislative and state-level actions targeting prediction markets as scrutiny over sports betting, war contracts and alleged insider trading builds.

item.title: Bitcoin’s quantum-resistance lag may become Ethereum’s bull case: Nic Carter
item.description: Crypto entrepreneur Nic Carter claims that Bitcoin developers still have their "head in the sand" when it comes to making Bitcoin quantum-resistant, compared to Ethereum.

item.title: Bhutan moves another 500 bitcoin to exchanges as 2026 outflows top $150 million
item.description: The Royal Government of Bhutan transferred 519.707 BTC on Wednesday, the latest in a series of increasingly large moves that have taken its holdings from a peak of roughly 13,000 BTC to 4,453.

item.title: Nvidia to Face Class Action Lawsuit Over Alleged Crypto Mining Revenue Gaps
item.description: The chipmaker failed to rebut claims its crypto disclosures affected its stock price, allowing the case to move forward.

item.title: Swan Bitcoin seeks to subpoena Cantor Fitzgerald, ex-CEO in ex-staff dispute
item.description: Swan Bitcoin claims that Howard Lutnick may have known about its failed Tether mining venture, after which employees allegedly stole documents, resigned and launched a rival firm.

item.title: XRP volatility hits cycle lows as $1.40 support comes into focus
item.description: Tight range and fading momentum suggest a breakout is near, with direction hinging on $1.40 hold.

item.title: Crypto Case Over Money Transmitter Laws Dismissed by US Judge
item.description: The decision leaves unresolved whether developers of non-custodial crypto tools must comply with federal money-transmission rules.

item.title: Australia's central bank backs tokenization as pilot finds $16.7B upside
item.description: Tokenized finance and related infrastructure upgrades could be “revolutionary,” according to industry advocates cited by the Reserve Bank of Australia.

item.title: Bitcoin Depot picks ex-MoneyGram boss as CEO as state actions mount
item.description: Former MoneyGram veteran Alex Holmes is now leading Bitcoin Depot, as crypto ATM operators face mounting legal scrutiny in multiple US states.

item.title: 🇺🇸 NEW: CFTC Chair Michael Selig says, “Reshoring “true” crypto perpetual futures in the US is a key piece of the CFTC’s innovation policy agenda.” - x.com
item.description: <a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiZEFVX3lxTE1BZklJWkYyTmV1clF4QWxEM0VMQWdmSm9FWFJqQXVJMC1BUFg4aGlJX1FyR01wb2JROU9sdThqMDU1bFNBOC00QVdLdFZkV21xVVV3dURBUDk0bm42WEpOaTlPdVc?oc=5" target="_blank">🇺🇸 NEW: CFTC Chair Michael Se…

item.title: Australia Lays Groundwork for Tokenized Asset Markets After RBA Project
item.description: Regulators are beginning work on legal and market infrastructure for tokenized assets, moving from pilot programs to real-world implementation.

item.title: Google Shrinks AI Memory With No Accuracy Loss—But There's a Catch
item.description: The technique reduces the memory required to run large language models as context windows grow, a key constraint on AI deployment.

item.title: Market structure bill compromise draws wide-ranging reaction from fractured crypto crowd
item.description: The yield agreement, seen as a step toward finally advancing the stalled market structure bill, hasn't yet fully won industry support.

item.title: Google Sets 2029 Deadline to Deal With Quantum Threat—Is It a Problem for Bitcoin?
item.description: Google just issued a 2029 deadline to encrypt its systems against quantum computers. Bitcoin may not have the same luxury of time.

item.title: JUST IN: 🇺🇸 Coinbase, Block, River, and the Bitcoin Policy Institute will advocate for a de minimis tax exemption for Bitcoin and crypto payments to staffers in Washington, DC tomorrow 🙌 - x.com
item.description: <a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiZ0FVX3lxTFA3VDhjR1diRzJ6QnVMYmhPajFwSEVxdmlBcEUycEkzbzVsaUhfamVmVkZmQ29pbmZuelE4MXNyZ0NDdWwtREphZGF5SW9OZGE0UHUyWWNoV1dBSmVHdm5OSlRmOS1VaTA?oc=5" target="_blank">JUST IN: 🇺🇸 Coinbase, Blo…

item.title: Elon Musk's X hires crypto-savvy design lead as X Money payments push inches closer
item.description: Benji Taylor, former CPO at Aave Labs and design head at Coinbase's Base, brings self-custody wallet and DeFi product experience to the social media platform.

item.title: $15 Billion in Bitcoin Options Expire Friday as Trump's Iran Deadline Looms
item.description: Bitcoin options worth $15 billion expire Friday—just as a Trump-Iran diplomatic deadline runs out. Should traders expect greater volatility?

item.title: BitGo teams with ZKsync to build tokenized deposit infrastructure to bring banks onchain
item.description: Now in testing, the platform aims to enable programmable payments and simplify blockchain adoption for financial institutions.

item.title: F1 Champion McLaren Racing Joins Hedera Council to Help Govern Network
item.description: Reigning Formula 1 champion McLaren will join Google, FedEx, IBM, and other firms in helping to guide Hedera’s growth.

item.title: Circle Selloff 'Looks Overdone' Analysts Say as Shares Rise After Cathie Wood Buys the Dip
item.description: Analysts argued that Circle's selloff was overblown after shares fell Tuesday amid crypto bill developments and a stablecoin rival's moves.

item.title: Crypto Long & Short: Prediction Markets Don’t Just Forecast Power - They Reshape It
item.description: In this week’s Crypto Long & Short Newsletter, Ryan Kirkley writes on how crypto prediction markets can risk incentivizing manipulation and amplify misinformation at scale.

item.title: AI agents to help investigators unearth crypto criminals, according to new TRM program
item.description: TRM Labs has added an AI agent to the services the blockchain analytics firm offers law enforcement agencies.

item.title: CoinShares Files for Bitcoin Volatility ETF Suite, Targeting BTC Price Swings
item.description: CoinShares filed for three Bitcoin volatility ETFs: a base, leveraged, and inverse fund. The funds could begin trading in early June 2026.

item.title: Franklin Templeton, Ondo Finance Bring 24/7 Tokenized ETF Trading to Crypto Users
item.description: Five Franklin Templeton ETFs will be tokenized via Ondo Finance as the firms seek to broaden access to traditional assets on-chain.

item.title: U.S. lawmakers dig into tokenizing securities as Trump ties muddy waters
item.description: A U.S. House of Representatives hearing reviewed tokenization, with a broad agreement that securities traded via token need the same treatment as regular trading.

item.title: JUST IN: US Senator Cynthia Lummis says lawmakers "are working around the clock" to advance Bitcoin & crypto market structure legislation 👏 "America’s financial future is at stake now— we can’t wait until 2030 for another chance." 🇺🇸 - x.com
item.description: <a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiZ0FVX3lxTFBNcWZHUjlIMXQyUy1yQWsySGNpcDJsUFRBTzVzanlPblZyY1F2a2VpZVBWNjdzSG85SmstMDZQd3BZZEVrbEJZZXFxNnRZbXhILV9FTW04LVNoRi0xRGVSYnllZmlZWDA?oc=5" target="_blank">JUST IN: US Senator Cynthia…

item.title: 🇰🇷 UPDATE: South Korea saw $60B crypto outflows to overseas platforms and private wallets in H2 2025. - x.com
item.description: <a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiZEFVX3lxTFBTdUdrSmNNR201RVNQd3IzWEJHUkdRREFxczdFc045dUJPdXpDbnRVdDNrVTZZdld0R2tCNlVvRDZaNm41OUNnUFRMVVNLQ0lueTg4OUs2cU9Wd3NCUTJOUHpIWjM?oc=5" target="_blank">🇰🇷 UPDATE: South Korea saw $6…
